rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Nonobjection Answers To Form And Nonform Iterrogatories And Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And For Attorneys Fees And Expenses;
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, September 20, 2007. Petitioner Rhonda Colvin's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Dionne Choyce is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. The matters set forth in petitioner's requests for admissions are ordered admitted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)
